eventPreCondition: Play if Strider/Aragorn is with a Free Peoples Army.
eventText:
Eliminate one Regular unit to recruit one Elite unit of the same Nation, in the Army with Strider/Aragorn.
Then, draw two Strategy Event cards.
combatPreCondition: Play if a Companion is in the battle.
combatText: The Shadow player rolls one die less in his Combat roll for each Companion in the battle (to a minimum of one).
